projects.name: Quality Mate Platform
projects.description: AI-powered automation platform integrated with Azure DevOps, Flowise, and GPT models. Delivers full test lifecycle automation including test case creation, task assignment, bug logging, script generation, and reporting with complete traceability from requirements to execution.
highlights: Full test lifecycle automation with AI integration
Automated test case generation from requirements
AI-powered bug logging and script creation
Improved efficiency and reduced manual effort

projects.name: AI-Powered Testing Agents
projects.description: Intelligent agents for self-healing scripts, predictive analytics, and real-user simulation. Enhanced test resilience, accelerated defect detection, and optimized regression execution through AI-driven automation.
highlights: Predictive analytics for proactive defect detection
Real-user simulation for improved test coverage

projects.name: Test League - Gamification Platform
projects.description: Gamified learning and competition program for QA engineers, incorporating quizzes, challenges, and leaderboards. Boosted team collaboration, engagement, and knowledge sharing across automation and manual testing teams.
highlights: Improved collaboration between QA and development teams

projects.name: QC Tube Knowledge Hub
projects.description: Internal platform for workshops, webinars, and knowledge sharing on software testing, automation frameworks, and AI innovations. Established a culture of continuous learning and technical excellence within the QA community.
highlights: Regular workshops and webinars on testing topics
Culture of continuous learning and upskilling

projects.name: Custom GPTs Ecosystem for QA Support
projects.description: Suite of 5 specialized Custom GPTs to support QC engineers: ISTQB Study Partner, QC Senior Interviewer, User Story & Test Case Generator, SQL Query Generator, and Python Automation Assistant. Streamlined routine tasks and provided on-demand mentorship.
highlights: ISTQB Study Partner for certification preparation
QC Senior Interviewer for mock interviews
User Story & Test Case Generator for automation
SQL Query Generator for database testing
Python Automation Assistant for scripting support

projects.name: Automation Dashboards & Metrics
projects.description: Interactive dashboards (Power BI, Metabase, custom solutions) to track automation coverage, defect detection rate, execution speed, and ROI. Provided real-time insights for management and supported data-driven decision-making.

projects.name: Elm Hackathon - Agent X Solution
projects.description: Innovative AI-driven solution using Nuha LLM, OpenAI LLM, LangChain, CrewAI, FastAPI, NestJS, and Angular. Secured 2nd place and received deep admiration from senior judges and executive leaders.
highlights: Integrated AI solution with multiple LLMs

projects.name: Thiqah Hackathon Organization
projects.description: Organized and mentored cross-functional teams on AI implementation for Thiqah's internal hackathon. Ensured high-quality prototypes, effective collaboration, and innovation across teams.
highlights: Mentored multiple teams on AI solutions

projects.name: Automation Framework Modernization
projects.description: Built and optimized automation frameworks using Robot Framework, Playwright, Cypress, Testim, and Appium. Reduced test cycle time by 30%, achieved 95% functional coverage, and improved testing efficiency by 20%.

projects.name: Government Platform Quality Assurance
projects.description: Delivered comprehensive quality assurance for high-impact projects with Saudi governmental institutions and ministries. Ensured compliance, performance, reliability, and security for critical government services.
highlights: Quality assurance for multiple government platforms
Performance and load testing using JMeter

projects.name: Cross-Platform Testing Solutions
projects.description: Performed comprehensive cross-platform testing across web, Android, iOS, and Smart TV applications. Ensured consistent performance and user experience across all platforms.
highlights: Testing across web, mobile, and Smart TV platforms

projects.name: Banking System Quality Assurance
projects.description: Developed and executed automated test scripts for financial applications. Performed API and integration testing, database validation using SQL, and ensured data integrity for financial transactions.
